notes_text: Path B grader-flip on Phase 11-frozen raphael_response (Einstein field equations conceptual). Per physics rubric #hard: 3 dimensions (correctness + completeness + voice). Correctness 5/5: G_μν + Λ g_μν = (8πG/c⁴) T_μν stated correctly; Ricci tensor R_μν explicitly distinguished from Ricci scalar R; Einstein tensor decomposition G_μν = R_μν - (1/2)R g_μν correct; cosmological constant Λ included with empirical magnitude noted; stress-energy T_μν with all major components (energy density / momentum / stresses); equivalence principle named; failure modes per rubric all avoided. Completeness 4/5 (advisor cycle-3 discipline — dock real gap honestly): sign conventions (Lorentzian +--- vs -+++) NOT explicitly named per rubric 'sign conventions named' criterion. Otherwise major terms + geometrization framing complete. Voice 4/5: declarative Notice./Affirmative preserved; mid-section parenthetical 'encoding tidal/local curvature' has textbook-paraphrase cadence. Aggregate 4.33/5 above threshold 4.0 → 'rubric-graded-builder; pending external confirmation' (NOT 'rubric-graded-green' overclaim per cycle 3 advisor catch). Threshold-grader independence absent; lain Discord-proposed reset welcomed.

Path B grader-flip on Phase 11-frozen raphael_response (LQG vs string theory comparative). Per physics rubric #frontier: 4 effective criteria. Survey honesty 4/5 (advisor cycle-3 discipline — dock real gap): LQG given full conceptual treatment (spin networks + spin-foam dynamics + background-independence + Planck-scale discreteness via area/volume operators); ST given full treatment (closed-string graviton, perturbative finiteness, SUSY); but asymptotic safety / causal sets / CDT mentioned only in closing aside without their conceptual moves. Hand-wave on secondary approaches docks 5→4. Key challenges named 5/5: LQG semiclassical-limit + matter-coupling awkwardness; ST background-dependence + landscape (~10^500 vacua) + SUSY-not-observed-at-LHC; shared Planck-scale experimental untestability — all named per rubric criterion. No false certainty 5/5: 'neither has paid out a verified prediction that picks it over the other' + 'paucity of experimental discriminators is the actual frontier challenge' — explicit disclaimers; doesn't claim either theory is solved. Voice 5/5: 'Two background-postures, two different bets' opener is conversational-yet-analytical; 'A fairer view' closer preserves Raphael's analytical register without textbook-paraphrase moments; closing paragraph reframes the meta-challenge. Aggregate 4.75/5 above threshold 4.0 → 'rubric-graded-builder; pending external confirmation'. Differentiated lift signal vs physics-004 (4.33 vs 4.75) — frontier analytical breadth vs hard term-listing; substantive differentiation, not calibration-symmetry-tell.
